summary: Frontend-only testing of GOAT7 Solana landing page (iteration 2 redesign) completed. All 15 acceptance criteria from the review request pass on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Hero (mascot, 3 CTAs with correct hrefs https://cr7goat.xyz and https://t.me/CR7GOATarmy), Contract Address box copies 'TBA' to clipboard, Treasury wallet box copies GqQCMmPf1sKRWaix85B79DNpgHGc8SrMNGec44q8mwg5 to clipboard, Header (Buy GOAT7 + Phantom Connect buttons, 6 nav links visible at xl viewport), Tokenomics (6 allocation cards with Presale 40%, Liquidity 25%, Marketing 15%, Team Locked 10%, Community Rewards 7%, CEX Listings 3% + Total Supply 10B / 10,000,000,000 GOAT7), Roadmap (4 phase cards Genesis through Ecosystem), NEW Security section (6 pillar cards security-pillar-0..5), Whitepaper (download button shows coming-soon toast), NEW Community section (3 cards with correct hrefs, CTA telegram+twitter buttons), FAQ (7 accordion triggers, aria-expanded toggles correctly), Footer (telegram channel link, website link, Solscan treasury link present), mobile drawer (toggle visible at 390px, desktop nav hidden, mobile-buy-button visible inside drawer, mascot stacks above headline). Zero page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: SOCIALS.whitepaper still points to '/goat7-whitepaper.pdf' which is not present in /public. Whitepaper.jsx handles this correctly by triggering a 'coming soon' toast (handleDownload treats non-existent local PDF as placeholder). No fix needed unless an actual PDF is added.
Hero, Community, Footer, Header all correctly use SOCIALS constants (telegramGroup, telegramChannel, website, buy, twitter) — hrefs verified against goat-data.js.
Mobile menu (mobile-menu-toggle) breakpoint correctly moved to xl (visible up to 1279px); desktop nav-link-* elements are hidden below xl, both verified.
test_credentials: N/A — pure static landing page, no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React landing at /. All 15 review acceptance criteria pass. Clipboard tests require grant_permissions(['clipboard-read','clipboard-write']). Use textContent (page.evaluate) rather than inner_text when checking section text after hash navigation — inner_text returned partial results after /#tokenomics goto, but textContent confirmed all tokenomics+roadmap copy is fully rendered. Treasury wallet must remain exactly GqQCMmPf1sKRWaix85B79DNpgHGc8SrMNGec44q8mwg5 (verified). Solscan footer link uses exact address.
